There is no existing vaccine and no active vaccine development program, as confirmed by current literature and CDC statements (which explicitly state there are no vaccines for any rickettsial diseases). Because a vaccine requires years of clinical trials and regulatory approval, the probability of one being legitimately developed and approved in the next few months is functionally zero.
